tagline: Cambridge's Lock & Safe Authority — Security You Can Trust
hero_subtitle: Expert locksmith services and safe solutions for homes and businesses across Greater Boston. From emergency lockouts to high-security vault installation, we do it all.
service_area_description: Serving Cambridge, Somerville, Boston, Brookline, Watertown, Newton, and the entire Greater Boston metro area.
seo_title: Metro Boston Lock & Safe | Locksmith & Safe Services in Cambridge, MA
seo_description: Metro Boston Lock & Safe — professional locksmith and safe services in Cambridge, MA. Residential, commercial, emergency lockouts, and safe installation. Locally trusted.
services_subtitle: From emergency lockouts to fireproof safe installation — full-service security solutions for homes and businesses across the metro.
reviews_subtitle: Cambridge families and business owners rely on Metro Boston Lock & Safe for quality work and honest pricing.
cta_heading: Locked out? Need a safe? Call the pros.
cta_subtitle: Fast emergency response and expert safe consultation. One call covers all your security needs.
footer_description: Professional locksmith and safe services in Cambridge and Greater Boston. Residential, commercial, automotive, and safe specialists. Locally owned and operated.

services_featured.name: Emergency Lockout Service
services_featured.description: Locked out of your home, business, or car? Our mobile technicians respond fast across Greater Boston — 24/7, including holidays.

services_secondary.name: Residential Locksmith
services_secondary.description: Lock installation, rekeying, deadbolt upgrades, smart lock setup, and complete home security assessments to protect your family.

services_accent.name: Commercial Security Solutions
services_accent.description: Access control, master key systems, high-security locks, and commercial safe installation for offices, retail, and industrial facilities.

services_wide.name: Safe Sales & Service
services_wide.description: Home safes, commercial vaults, fire-rated safes, gun safes, and deposit safes. Expert installation, combination changes, and safe cracking.

about_features.title: Lock & Safe Specialists
about_features.description: Unlike general locksmiths, we combine deep lock expertise with professional safe services — one company for all your security needs.

about_features.title: Fast Emergency Response
about_features.description: Cambridge-based mobile technicians reach you quickly across Greater Boston for lockouts and urgent security needs.

about_features.title: Licensed & Insured
about_features.description: Every technician is fully licensed and insured, with specialized training in both locksmith services and safe mechanics.

reviews.name: Homeowner
reviews.text: Metro Boston installed a fireproof safe in our basement and rekeyed every lock in the house. Thorough, professional, and reasonably priced. Couldn't ask for more.

reviews.name: Restaurant Owner
reviews.text: They set up our master key system and installed a commercial safe for our daily deposits. Fast, reliable, and they really know their stuff.

reviews.name: Property Manager
reviews.text: I've used Metro Boston Lock & Safe for years across multiple properties. Always responsive, always fair pricing, always quality work. Highly recommend.
